creator: _jkrow
caption:
Say ‘Silver Lake’ and I’ll send you a little discount for your stay ✨

Save this for summer planning and send it to your group chat. This is the type of place everyone always says they want and then can’t find 😅

📍 The Silver Lake Haus at @dellcollective is a stunning lakeside cottage right on the water in Western NY, close to Letchworth State Park, waterfalls and some of the best small towns in the area

It sleeps up to 12, so it actually works for a full group trip, but still feels cozy enough for a couples weekend

A few things I loved:
• Right on the lake with a private dock
• Screened-in porch overlooking the water (this alone sold me)
• Close to hiking, waterfalls, and antique shops
• Pet friendly 🐶

🗓️ It’s a seasonal cottage, which means availability is limited and summer dates go super fast!  The 2026 calendar is already open (including Labor Day)

✨ I worked with Dell Collective to get you a little $$ off your stay. Say ‘Silver Lake’ and I’ll send you the info!
